message: A value saved with /engine-tune no longer matches the engine's current settings: it names a setting the engine has renamed or removed, or a fixed setting that cannot be adjusted. The saved value is being ignored and the engine's own default is used in its place, so a setting the operator meant to change has silently stopped applying. This check surfaces it at the merge rather than letting it be quietly forgotten. It reads only the committed saved-settings file (.engine/operator-overrides.json) and is silent when there is none. To fix: open /engine-tune to set the value again on a setting the engine still has, or remove the out-of-date entry from the saved-settings file.
